selected_topic: Mysterious faint exoplanet Beta Pictoris d imaged from Earth for the first time
news_angle: Astronomers detected and imaged the faintest exoplanet ever seen from Earth, Beta Pictoris d, significantly dimmer than its nearby neighbor planet. This breakthrough discovery brings new insights into distant planetary systems.
why_this_is_news: It’s a fresh, visually compelling astronomical discovery involving a very faint exoplanet, a first-ever detailed Earth-based imaging event revealing a mysterious new world near Beta Pictoris star.
specific_subject: The faint exoplanet Beta Pictoris d
specific_action: was imaged from Earth for the very first time, revealing its presence near its host star
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao as a cosmic streetwise explorer, stealthily spotting a hidden ghost-planet through a high-tech telescope in a star-lit urban nightscape
image_prompt: An athletic, compact orange tabby cat with expressive large eyes and a mischievous confident grin, dressed in futuristic streetwear with a black hoodie and cap under bright cosmic lights, holding a glowing high-tech telescope aimed at a starry sky. In the background, a faint ethereal blue ghostly planet barely visible near a bright star, evoking mystery and discovery. Urban futuristic sci-fi vibe blending street style with outer space themes, cinematic anime style, dynamic pose and lighting emphasizing excitement and adventure.
easter_eggs: Small beta pictoris star symbol on Hunk Mao's hoodie
Hidden tiny telescope icon on shoe sole
Planet d subtly reflected in cat's eyes
caption: Astronomers finally captured an image of the faintest exoplanet ever seen from Earth, Beta Pictoris d. Even Hunk Mao’s keen eyes couldn’t spot a cooler celestial discovery tonight!
